category_sources: source_facts.description says GNOME Spreadsheet Application; official Gnumeric manual describes Gnumeric as a spreadsheet program.
display_name_sources: Official Gnumeric homepage and source_facts.name identify the project as Gnumeric.
docs_sources: Official Gnumeric manual is published at https://gnome.pages.gitlab.gnome.org/gnumeric/manual/.
repo_sources: Official Gnumeric development page says source lives in GNOME's git system and links the Gnumeric source module.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Gnumeric homepage/manual describe a GNOME spreadsheet application for numeric data.
